costBasisNote: Cost basis is provisional: it was set to the live price on 2026-06-23 (the date this portfolio was sized) because the originally specified cost-basis date, June 26, 2026, had not occurred yet. These costBasis values will be updated to the actual June 26, 2026 market close once that date has passed.
holdingsNote: isChipStock flags the mandate's 'expensive, hype-driven chip stocks capped at ~10% combined' rule. This is a judgment call applied at portfolio-construction time, not a feed from any API — only NVDA is flagged among these 7 holdings.
